title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 7: Fit for Emperors and Kings
description: Chapter 7 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 7 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: The non-action of the sage is what is called the Way of heaven. The non-action of the man of virtue is what is called the Way of earth. The empty-mindedness, the heart-fasting — this is the Way.
